title: BSNC Announces 2021 Annual Meeting Election Results
summary: BSNC held its virtual 2021 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Saturday, Oct. 2. Shareholders voted on the election of five board directors. Incumbents Ella Anagick, Edna R. “Becka” Baker, Jason Evans, Stephan P. “Steve” Ivanoff and Lee M. Ryan were elected to the Board. Directors serve three-year ter...

title: ANCSA at 50: Koniag Alutiiq Land Claims
summary: A short video looking at the origins of Koniag and its early leadership debuted at the 2021 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. Source
